title: Purple Axiom Icons
description: This resource pack changes the default red axiom building mod icons to be a light purple colour. Should work with every version of axiom
body:
This resource pack makes the builder tool icons a light purple colour instead of the default red.

The aim is to make them easier to look at and to improve ease of use for colourblind people.

Here is a little showcase:
![The builder tools in-game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b0ec55dff5ce7f9a524edde2eb633ad081e8680f.png)

---

This pack is inspired by the "Axiom Dark Mode" resource pack:
[Axiom Dark Mode Resource Pack (ADDM)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/axiom-dark-mode-(addm))

Enjoy!
